summary: Iteration 8: Faculty-Student Linkage & Master Schedule Calendar - All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Master Schedule Calendar (Schedule tab with weekly grid), Faculty Legend with color-coded badges, Linked Students section in faculty detail view, GradeForm with faculty dropdown selector.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/faculty/schedule/all correctly enriches schedule entries with faculty_name via lookup
GET /api/faculty/member/{id}/students properly resolves linkage through both faculty_id and teacher_name matching
POST /api/students/{id}/grades correctly accepts optional faculty_id field
MasterScheduleCalendar component renders weekly grid (Period x Day) with color-coded cells per faculty
LinkedStudents component fetches and displays students linked via grades with course details
GradeForm has faculty dropdown that auto-fills teacher_name on selection
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new UI features working correctly

master_schedule_calendar.api_endpoint: GET /api/faculty/schedule/all returns schedule entries with enriched faculty_name ✓
master_schedule_calendar.ui_schedule_tab: Schedule tab shows weekly calendar grid (Period rows x Day columns) ✓
master_schedule_calendar.ui_calendar_cells: Calendar cells display subject name, faculty name, room number, time ✓
master_schedule_calendar.ui_faculty_legend: Faculty legend at top of calendar with color-coded badges ✓

faculty_student_linkage.api_endpoint: GET /api/faculty/member/{id}/students returns students linked by faculty_id or teacher_name ✓
faculty_student_linkage.ui_linked_students: Faculty detail view shows 'Linked Students' section below schedule ✓
faculty_student_linkage.ui_student_details: Linked students show student name, grade level, GPA, and courses with grades ✓

grade_with_faculty_id.ui_auto_fill: Selecting faculty from dropdown auto-fills teacher name ✓
grade_with_faculty_id.ui_manual_input: Can still type teacher name manually if faculty not in dropdown ✓

regression_tests.faculty_crud: Faculty CRUD (list, create, update, delete) still works ✓
regression_tests.student_grades: Student grades CRUD still works with and without faculty_id ✓

seed_data_verified.faculty: Sarah Johnson (EMP001, Mathematics dept, Teacher) with Algebra I, Geometry subjects
seed_data_verified.schedule: Sarah Johnson teaches Algebra I on Monday P1 (08:00-08:50) in Room 101, Grade 9
seed_data_verified.student: John Smith (STU001, Grade 10, GPA: 3.65) with Geometry (B+) grade linked to Sarah Johnson

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8: Faculty-Student Linkage and Master Schedule Calendar features fully implemented and tested. Backend has new endpoints: GET /api/faculty/schedule/all (master schedule with faculty_name), GET /api/faculty/member/{id}/students (linked students via grades). Frontend FacultyStaff.jsx has new Schedule tab with MasterScheduleCalendar component and LinkedStudents component in faculty detail view. StudentRecords.jsx GradeForm has faculty dropdown that auto-fills teacher_name. All TEST_ prefixed data was cleaned up after testing.
